summary: Step 6 Universal Document Extraction and Review Pipeline testing completed. All 28 backend tests passed. Fixed route conflict bug where /extractions/pending-review was being caught by /extractions/{extraction_id}. Document extraction endpoints working correctly: trigger extraction, get extraction, review (approve/edit_and_approve/reject), retry, and pending-review list.
seed_data_creation: Used existing RTW document (add610d7-8819-4182-a03e-b76aa0978ea0) and employee (d88335f6-1b18-435a-8086-28af4a583f77) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Step 6 Document Extraction Pipeline fully tested. Key features verified: (1) POST /api/documents/{id}/extract triggers GPT Vision extraction, (2) GET /api/documents/{id}/extraction returns extraction record or 'not_extracted' status, (3) POST /api/documents/{id}/extraction/review with actions approve/edit_and_approve/reject, (4) POST /api/documents/{id}/extraction/retry re-runs extraction with force=true, (5) GET /api/document-extractions/pending-review lists document extractions awaiting review, (6) GET /api/extractions/pending-review lists profile extractions awaiting review, (7) Document type classification works (RTW, DBS, Training, ID, Proof of Address), (8) Extraction never auto-verifies documents, (9) Approved extractions include provenance metadata (reviewed_by, reviewed_at, approved_field_values). BUG FIXED: Route conflict where /extractions/pending-review was being caught by /extractions/{extraction_id} - moved specific route before parameterized route and created separate /api/document-extractions/pending-review endpoint for document extractions.

review_reject.details: POST /api/documents/{id}/extraction/review with action='reject' does not update canonical records

document_pending_review.details: GET /api/document-extractions/pending-review lists document extractions awaiting review

profile_pending_review.details: GET /api/extractions/pending-review lists profile extractions awaiting review

extraction_never_auto_verifies.details: Extraction does not change document verification_status

provenance_metadata.details: Approved extractions include reviewed_by, reviewed_at, approved_field_values

field_metadata.details: Extraction includes field_metadata with source_type and confidence

extraction_status_values.details: extraction_status is one of: pending, completed, needs_review, failed

review_status_values.details: review_status is one of: awaiting_review, approved, edited, rejected

issues_severity.details: Issues have valid severity: info, warning, blocker

bug_fixed.description: Route conflict: /extractions/pending-review was being caught by /extractions/{extraction_id}
bug_fixed.root_cause: In FastAPI, routes are matched in order. The parameterized route /extractions/{extraction_id} was defined before /extractions/pending-review, so 'pending-review' was being treated as an extraction_id
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Moved /extractions/pending-review route to be defined BEFORE /extractions/{extraction_id}. Also created separate /api/document-extractions/pending-review endpoint for document extractions to avoid confusion with profile extractions
